summary: Quick Actions Menu | Hearing Navigation Prompts When on Rightmost Option
description:
GIVEN the user is in the Quick Actions Menu
AND there are multiple options available
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action: WHEN the user focuses on the rightmost option
steps.result: THEN the user will hear:  “In the Quick Actions Menu, <Option Name>, x out of y options. Press select to <quick_actions>, Press left for more quick actions options, Press down for player controls, Press back to dismiss controls.”
